name: AI Model Comparison — Exa Research + Claude Analysis to Slack
description: Researches open-source and proprietary LLM options via Exa, uses Claude AI to compare models across key dimensions (performance, cost, speed, use cases), and posts a structured comparison to Slack.

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the comparison

useCase.description: The use case to compare LLMs for (e.g. 'code generation', 'customer support chatbot', 'document summarization')

requirements.default: Balance of quality, speed, and cost
requirements.description: Specific requirements (e.g. 'must be open-source', 'low latency required', 'budget under $100/mo')

steps.name: Search for LLM benchmarks and comparisons

data.query: best open source LLM {{$.input.useCase}} huggingface llama mistral

steps.name: Build AI prompt for model comparison

code.source:
var ctx = $.steps.compileResearch.output;
var prompt = 'You are an AI/ML expert. Compare LLM options for the following use case, using the research data provided.

USE CASE: ' + $.input.useCase + '
REQUIREMENTS: ' + ($.input.requirements || 'Balance of quality, speed, and cost') + '

BENCHMARK & COMPARISON DATA:
' + ctx.benchContext + '
OPEN-SOURCE LLM DATA:
' + ctx.osContext + '

Compare at least 5 models (mix of open-source and proprietary). For each model, evaluate:
- Performance quality for this use case
- Speed/latency
- Cost
- Ease of deployment
- Community/ecosystem

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "recommendation": "Top pick and why",
  "models": [
    {
      "name": "...",
      "type": "open-source|proprietary",
      "scores": { "quality": 0, "speed": 0, "cost": 0, "deployment": 0 },
      "pros": ["pro1"],
      "cons": ["con1"],
      "bestFor": "..."
    }
  ],
  "comparisonNotes": "..."
}';
return { prompt };

steps.name: Run Claude AI for model comparison
Parse AI response and strip fences
Build Slack Block Kit comparison message
